meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.17 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] 小文字 here is an ABSOLUTE font size (特大>大>中>本文>小), a forward-reference emphasis-page treatment, particle は, single target, inline — distinct from the relative N段階…文字 and from the script-glyph 上付き/下付き小文字 (§6.16) whose keyword it is a substring of (the recogniser matches the whole は… body). Per §7.5 it consumes the immediately preceding target literal ヱ and yields an emphasis node; §8 rendering is <span class="aozora-font-small">. Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor. Corpus: 8 「X」は小文字 occurrences across 3 works.
